activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, adding the missing perfect auxiliary form.
activities.prompt: The booking has be confirmed.

evaluator.answer: The booking has been confirmed

activities.explanation: El present perfect passive necesita «has been».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with correct agreement.
activities.prompt: The documents has been signed.

evaluator.answer: The documents have been signed

activities.explanation: El sujeto plural usa «have been signed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, adding the missing passive word after the modal.
activities.prompt: The form can completed online.

evaluator.answer: The form can be completed online

activities.explanation: La pasiva modal necesita «can be completed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence using “be”, not “been”, after the modal.
activities.prompt: Safety glasses must been worn.

evaluator.answer: Safety glasses must be worn

activities.explanation: Después de «must» usamos «be worn».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct participle.
activities.prompt: The parcel has been send.

evaluator.answer: The parcel has been sent

activities.explanation: El participio de «send» es «sent».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete negative sentence with correct agreement.
activities.prompt: The fault haven't been identified yet.

evaluator.answer: The fault hasn't been identified yet

activities.explanation: El sujeto singular usa «hasn't been».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question with correct perfect passive order.
activities.prompt: Have been the rooms inspected?

evaluator.answer: Have the rooms been inspected

activities.explanation: El sujeto se coloca entre «Have» y «been».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct irregular participle.
activities.prompt: The final design has been chose.

evaluator.answer: The final design has been chosen

activities.explanation: El participio de «choose» es «chosen».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct passive after “should”.
activities.prompt: The figures should checked again.

evaluator.answer: The figures should be checked again

activities.explanation: La pasiva necesita «should be checked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question with correct modal passive order.
activities.prompt: Can be the date changed?

evaluator.answer: Can the date be changed

activities.explanation: El sujeto se coloca entre «Can» y «be».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence using past simple passive with the finished-time marker.
activities.prompt: The result has been announced yesterday afternoon.

evaluator.answer: The result was announced yesterday afternoon

activities.explanation: «Yesterday afternoon» requiere pasado simple pasivo.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct participle and natural position of “already”.
activities.prompt: The invoices have already been pay by the accounts team.

evaluator.answer: The invoices have already been paid by the accounts team

activities.explanation: Después de «been» usamos el participio irregular «paid».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct passive after “may”.
activities.prompt: The outdoor event may been cancelled.

evaluator.answer: The outdoor event may be cancelled

activities.explanation: Después de «may» usamos «be cancelled».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence so printing is unnecessary, not prohibited.
activities.prompt: The form mustn't be printed; a digital copy is sufficient.

evaluator.answer: The form doesn't have to be printed; a digital copy is sufficient

activities.explanation: La copia digital elimina la necesidad, no prohíbe imprimir.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence so removing the seal is prohibited.
activities.prompt: The security seal doesn't have to be broken under any circumstances.

evaluator.answer: The security seal mustn't be broken under any circumstances

activities.explanation: «Under any circumstances» exige una prohibición con «mustn't».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting agreement and the participle.
activities.prompt: Several changes has been make to the schedule.

evaluator.answer: Several changes have been made to the schedule

activities.explanation: El plural usa «have» y el participio de «make» es «made».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the perfect and modal passives.
activities.prompt: The draft has be revised, but the references should been checked.

evaluator.answer: The draft has been revised, but the references should be checked

activities.explanation: El perfect usa «been» y el modal usa «be».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting agreement, order and participle.
activities.prompt: Has been the new signs put up?

evaluator.answer: Have the new signs been put up

activities.explanation: El plural requiere «Have», seguido del sujeto y «been put up».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct future possibility and passive participle.
activities.prompt: An extra session might been offer next month.

evaluator.answer: An extra session might be offered next month

activities.explanation: La posibilidad futura usa «might be offered».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question with correct modal passive order.
activities.prompt: Should be this section removed before publication?

evaluator.answer: Should this section be removed before publication

activities.explanation: El sujeto se coloca entre «Should» y «be removed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the dated and current-result passives.
activities.prompt: The old permit has been cancelled in 2024, and a replacement has be issued now.

evaluator.answer: The old permit was cancelled in 2024, and a replacement has been issued now

activities.explanation: La fecha terminada usa pasado simple y el resultado actual present perfect passive.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting both plural perfect passives.
activities.prompt: The faulty units has been recalled and affected customers have be contacted.

evaluator.answer: The faulty units have been recalled and affected customers have been contacted

activities.explanation: Ambos sujetos plurales usan «have been + participio».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the prohibition and no-necessity passives.
activities.prompt: Originals mustn't been removed, but copies don't have to returned.

evaluator.answer: Originals mustn't be removed, but copies don't have to be returned

activities.explanation: Ambas estructuras necesitan «be + participio».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting all three passive phrases.
activities.prompt: The alarm has been check, one sensor must been replaced, and the system can tested remotely.

evaluator.answer: The alarm has been checked, one sensor must be replaced, and the system can be tested remotely

activities.explanation: El perfect necesita el participio y cada modal necesita «be + participio».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question and response with correct perfect and modal passive forms.
activities.prompt: Have the samples been label? No; they should been labelled before collection.

evaluator.answer: Have the samples been labelled? No; they should be labelled before collection

activities.explanation: El perfect usa «been labelled» y el modal «be labelled».
